div.p: Where ideas amplify and logic builds the future. 36 hours. Real problems. Extraordinary solutions. Join the brightest minds to code, create, and compete.

EchoLogic is MITS Gwalior's flagship 36-hour hackathon — a space where ambitious builders turn raw ideas into real solutions. No limits. No gatekeepers. Just you, your team, and 36 hours to change everything.

div.div: Build across 12+ tracks — AI/ML, Web3, Hardware, EdTech, HealthTech and beyond. The problem space is entirely yours.
Get real-time guidance from industry engineers, founders, and researchers throughout the entire event.
Cash prizes, internship fast-tracks, cloud credits, and exclusive swag across all winning categories.

div.p: EchoLogic's interface is crafted for the competitor — fast, clear, and distraction-free. From the registration badge to the live stats strip, every pixel is designed to keep you focused on what matters: shipping your best work.
